selected_issue.issue: Missing economy totals in contract diagnostics payload and replay completeness gate
selected_issue.title: cash_totals absent from contract diagnostics and replay required-key contract

why_it_outranked_alternatives: Current evidence showed no unresolved rank 1-4 issues (structural violations 0, canonical tests passing, no replay mismatch signal, no high-frequency invariant failures). The highest unresolved bounded issue was rank 5 instrumentation: Bible-aligned diagnostic round-state evidence included no cash_totals economy field.

Wired validated Frame.cash_totals into contract diagnostics emission.
Added cash_totals to required contract diagnostics completeness keys.
Updated unit diagnostics calls and assertions to include cash_totals.

validation_performed.result: cash_totals key required and present with presence rate 1.0, missing count 0

before_after_evidence.before: contract_diagnostics and replay required-key contract omitted cash_totals economy evidence.
before_after_evidence.after: contract_diagnostics emits cash_totals and replay summary enforces/reports its completeness.

unresolved_risks: Presence checks do not guarantee semantic correctness of upstream economy values.
Small replay fixtures may not expose all provider-specific economy edge cases.
stop_reason: Selected rank-5 instrumentation gap fixed with minimal bounded change set and repeated targeted + canonical validation.
